svg.metadata: CUPIDS Lab — generated from _data/brand.yml. A brand and graphic identity for an academic public interest data lab. A black terminal with monospace fonts and syntax initially feels intimidating and cold. A near-black canvas, CU gold accents, an IBM Plex Mono "cupids-lab" wordmark. The recurring Cupid idiom is a "heart with arrow" drawn as 8-bit pixel art — a retro, terminal / coding-agent nod rather than the proprietary emoji. The Unicode "color heart" palette still provides variation in the decorative art, and the ASCII heart "<3" lives on as playful microcopy. Restrained and civic with a little matchmaker playfulness.

text.font-family: 'Apple Color Emoji','Segoe UI Emoji','Noto Color Emoji',sans-serif
